body:
## Summary
- add `--focus-religious-freedom-parallelism` to `validate-content`
- report focused `publishedQuestions` and `questionReligiousFreedomParallelismValidated` counters
- route the q116 religious-freedom mutation fixture through the focused validator and add routing coverage

## Validation
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content -- --focus-religious-freedom-parallelism`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test --test-name-pattern "religious-freedom option parallelism|focus-religious-freedom" tests/content-published-question-types.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
title: test: add q116 religious freedom focused validator
